name: Carrot Burgers
recipeIngredient: 10 Carrots, peeled and cut into chunks
1/2 Cup Wheat Germ, Bran or Flour (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the carrots in a medium-sized saucepan containing 3 or 4 inches of water. Steam over medium heat for 15 minutes until soft. Drain and mash well using a potato masher.
2. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the diced garlic, onions, celery, and peppers. Sauté for 7 minutes.
3. Add the tamari, basil, garlic powder, parsley, and oregano to the skillet. Sauté for 2 more minutes until the vegetables are soft.
4. In a large bowl, combine the mashed carrots, sautéed vegetables, tahini, and peanut butter.
5. Season to taste. If the mixture is too wet, add the wheat germ to make it hold together.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Form the mixture into patties and place on an oiled cookie sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until golden brown on top.
8. Turn the patties over and bake for another 10 to 12 minutes until golden brown on the other side.
